description: Create a multi-file Talon module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\git_system\ to manage Git operations for the repository at C:\workspace\requests\. In git_system.py, define a 'user.git_branch' list and an 'update_git_branches' action that retrieves branch names using 'git branch --format="%(refname:short)"', replacing slashes (/), dashes (-), and dots (.) with spaces for the spoken forms. In git_system.talon, provide terminal-specific voice commands for 'git refresh branches' (calling the update action for the target repository), 'git checkout {user.git_branch}', 'git status', 'git add all', and 'git commit <user.text>'.
